question:
A 18-month guarantee is given based on the assumption that no more than 5%
of new cars will be returned.
(a) The time to failure T of a car has a constant failure rate. What is the
maximum failure rate that can be tolerated?
(b) Determine the probability that a new car will fail within three years
assuming that the car was functioning at 18 months.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
